changes.reason: Canonical count is below 100 and Mac Bluetooth accessory connection failures are a high-value distinct symptom cluster not covered by existing Mac or iPhone/iPad Bluetooth articles.

妙控键盘 妙控鼠标 妙控板 无法连接 Mac

canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical Bluetooth coverage is for iPhone/iPad accessories and AirPods. Mac external display mentions accessories only for display connections. No canonical article covers Mac Bluetooth pairing, Magic accessories, Bluetooth audio routing, keyboard response, and interference/service boundaries.
